netkeiba_append.pedigree_tail_coverage: complete in the current 2026 coverage snapshot

live_jra.current_behavior: latest live odds can be refreshed and published
live_jra.missing_for_research: durable repeated snapshots per race and explicit scheduled post/bet cutoff provenance

market_proxy_gap.name: historical_pre_bet_odds_snapshots
market_proxy_gap.impact: Historical odds are informative as a common market proxy, but proxy-market ROI may overstate or understate executable live ROI because the decision-time price is unknown.
market_proxy_gap.approved_fallback: Use historical odds unchanged for common-policy architecture comparison and label the result proxy_market_roi.
market_proxy_gap.required_parallel_action: Start durable JRA odds snapshot capture and estimate cutoff-to-final price movement prospectively.

examples: stable comments encoded only when timestamped pre-race
high_value_feature_gaps.reason: Captures current condition not fully represented by historical race performance.

high_value_feature_gaps.data: pre-race body-weight announcement history with timestamps
high_value_feature_gaps.reason: Current body condition is useful but must be available before the selected betting cutoff.
Current aggregate recent-rank features discard interaction between running style and expected field composition.

high_value_feature_gaps.data: weather and going snapshots before post time
high_value_feature_gaps.reason: Race-card values may not represent the information state at an earlier betting cutoff.
They alter both field interactions and market prices and need event timestamps.

next_actions: Implement append-only JRA odds snapshots keyed by race, runner, official timestamp, fetch timestamp, and scheduled post time.
Freeze the existing historical odds as a common proxy repricing dataset so architecture comparison can proceed now.
Implement candidate B and C as separate experiment issues, with candidate A as the control.
Report proxy_market_roi separately from asof_market_roi and require a conservative execution haircut for promotion decisions until timestamped coverage is representative.
After prospective snapshots accumulate, compare no adjustment, cutoff haircut, segmented haircut, and quantile price-movement models.
